en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.
Avetta PQF - Singapore bizSAFE Level 3 Applicability Assessment

bizSAFE Level 3 is required for companies bidding for contracts or tenders with bizSAFE Partners, main construction firms, and the government sector. bizSAFE Level 3 recognises that your company has conducted risk assessments for every work activity and process in your workplace, in compliance with the requirements in the [WSH (Risk Management) Regulations.](https://sso.agc.gov.sg/SL/WSHA2006-RG8)
Does your company have a bizSAFE Level 3 certificate?
As an authorized signatory, I hereby confirm that the information provided by our company is accurate and reflects our requirement to obtain the bizSAFE Level 3 certification.
